title: stelestylis coriacea
intro: Stelestylis coriacea is a type of flowering plant, also known as the 'Borneo Coral Tree', that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Stelestylis coriacea has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits such as reducing mucus production and improving lung function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
